subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy toil is commendable in the sight of the Lord, and thy hardships are remembered and well known
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله زحمات تو در آستان الهی مقبول و مشقات تو مذکور و مشهور همچه گمان
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
